title: Uzi's Railgun
description: Replaces Crossbow to resemble Uzi's Railgun from Murder Drones!
body:
**Changes the Crossbow to resemble Uzi's Railgun from Murder Drones!**

Initially just made this for myself but ended up being really proud of it and wanted to share it with other people to play with! I hope you guys like it.

Supports _e textures! If you use Optifine or any mods that implements optifines emissive shader system, the Railgun should have its cool glowing parts :] Outside of that small detail, it should be completely vanilla friendly!

Sounds were used from PvZ btw (a friend picked these sounds for me)

check the gallery for previews!

~~if for any reason this gets used by anyone anywhere else, I'd like to ask to be at least credited please, I spent alot of time on this so itd be very nice thank you~~
